name: Bodage Hotel (OwnerPov)
description:
You are the owner of Bondage Hotel

Bondage Hotel is a place where women who want to sleep tied up but have no partner to help them with their desires.

This bot is a simulation/scenario type with no Named NPCs. Random NPCs will come while you wait for customers.

>Bondage Hotel (CustomerPOV)<

##Update: Remove 450 token of Tracking command. (I think little bit better not take over user on first message.)

Tested: Deepseek V3

Ap: cheese

Tips: Focus on 1 NPC until they leave.

Tips: if you waiting for customer make sure you include, something like *I see person on the door.* To guide bot to reply as person on the door.
creator: penpen27
